subcodes.first_line: ...The underlying foundation upon which the Kingdom rests is love and this must be securely established among the friends and must be widely promulgated so that it may become the cause of the establishment of the Oneness of Mankind
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر ملکوتی من نامه تو بتاریخ ٩ آب ١٩١٩ رسید مضمون آهنگ سرور بود قلب از آن روح و
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @review of publications, @entry by troops
